name: server-tour
description: Multi-embed onboarding tour. Pin in #welcome or post once new members can see it. Replace channel IDs after import.

embeds.title: 1. Read the rules
embeds.description: Quick read in <#RULES_CHANNEL_ID>. Three minutes, saves you a ban.

embeds.title: 2. Pick your roles
embeds.description: Self-assign in <#ROLES_CHANNEL_ID>. Roles unlock channels and ping you for stuff you care about.

embeds.title: 3. Say hi
embeds.description: Drop in <#GENERAL_CHANNEL_ID> — we don't bite. Tell us where you're from.

embeds.title: 4. Need help?
embeds.description: Open a ticket in <#SUPPORT_CHANNEL_ID> or @ a mod. We respond within a day.
